name: activity_stream
exclusionReason: Runtime audit stream entries are not desired-state configuration objects.

fields.name: action_node
fields.description: The cluster node the activity took place on.

fields.name: changes
fields.description: A summary of the new and changed values when an object is created, updated, or deleted

fields.name: object1
fields.description: For create, update, and delete events this is the object type that was affected. For associate and disassociate events this is the object type associated or disassociated with object2.

fields.name: object2
fields.description: Unpopulated for create, update, and delete events. For associate and disassociate events this is the object type that object1 is being associated with.

fields.name: object_association
fields.description: When present, shows the field name of the role or relationship that changed.

fields.name: object_type
fields.description: When present, shows the model on which the role or relationship was defined.

fields.name: operation
fields.description:
The action taken with respect to the given object(s).

* `create` - Entity Created
* `update` - Entity Updated
* `delete` - Entity Deleted
* `associate` - Entity Associated with another Entity
* `disassociate` - Entity was Disassociated with another Entity

name: ad_hoc_commands
exclusionReason: Ad-hoc command runs are runtime execution records.

fields.name: execution_environment
fields.description: The container image to be used for execution.

fields.name: job_type
fields.description:
* `run` - Run
* `check` - Check

fields.name: module_name
fields.description:
* `command` - command
* `shell` - shell
* `yum` - yum
* `apt` - apt
* `apt_key` - apt_key
* `apt_repository` - apt_repository
* `apt_rpm` - apt_rpm
* `service` - service
* `group` - group
* `user` - user
* `mount` - mount
* `ping` - ping
* `selinux` - selinux
* `setup` - setup
* `win_ping` - win_ping
* `win_service` - win_service
* `win_updates` - win_updates
* `win_group` - win_group
* `win_user` - win_user

fields.name: verbosity
fields.description:
* `0` - 0 (Normal)
* `1` - 1 (Verbose)
* `2` - 2 (More Verbose)
* `3` - 3 (Debug)
* `4` - 4 (Connection Debug)
* `5` - 5 (WinRM Debug)

fields.name: limit
fields.description: The limit to restrict the returned hosts for the related auto-created inventory source, special to constructed inventory.

fields.name: opa_query_path
fields.description: The query path for the OPA policy to evaluate prior to job execution. The query path should be formatted as package/rule.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: Organization containing this inventory.

fields.name: prevent_instance_group_fallback
fields.description: If enabled, the inventory will prevent adding any organization instance groups to the list of preferred instances groups to run associated job templates on.If this setting is enabled and you provided an empty list, the global instance groups will be applied.

fields.name: source_vars
fields.description: The source_vars for the related auto-created inventory source, special to constructed inventory.

fields.name: update_cache_timeout
fields.description: The cache timeout for the related auto-created inventory source, special to constructed inventory

fields.name: variables
fields.description: Inventory variables in JSON or YAML format.

fields.name: verbosity
fields.description: The verbosity level for the related auto-created inventory source, special to constructed inventory

fields.name: injectors
fields.description: Enter injectors using either JSON or YAML syntax. Refer to the documentation for example syntax.

fields.name: inputs
fields.description: Enter inputs using either JSON or YAML syntax. Refer to the documentation for example syntax.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: * `cloud` - Cloud\n* `net` - Network

fields.name: credential_type
fields.description: Specify the type of credential you want to create. Refer to the documentation for details on each type.

fields.name: inputs
fields.description: Credential inputs are treated as write-only secret payloads.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: Inherit permissions from organization roles. If provided on creation, do not give either user or team.

fields.name: team
fields.description: Write-only field used to add team to owner role. If provided, do not give either user or organization. Only valid for creation.

fields.name: user
fields.description: Write-only field used to add user to owner role. If provided, do not give either team or organization. Only valid for creation.

fields.name: image
fields.description: The full image location, including the container registry, image name, and version tag.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: The organization used to determine access to this execution environment.

fields.name: pull
fields.description:
Pull image before running?

* `always` - Always pull container before running.
* `missing` - Only pull the image if not present before running.
* `never` - Never pull container before running.

fields.name: variables
fields.description: Group variables in JSON or YAML format.

name: host_metrics
exclusionReason: Host metrics are runtime telemetry and not managed desired-state configuration.

fields.name: automated_counter
fields.description: How many times was the host automated

fields.name: deleted
fields.description: Boolean flag saying whether the host is deleted and therefore not counted into the subscription consumption

fields.name: deleted_counter
fields.description: How many times was the host deleted

fields.name: first_automation
fields.description: When the host was first automated against

fields.name: last_automation
fields.description: When the host was last automated against

fields.name: last_deleted
fields.description: When the host was last deleted

fields.name: used_in_inventories
fields.description: How many inventories contain this host

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Is this host online and available for running jobs?

fields.name: instance_id
fields.description: The value used by the remote inventory source to uniquely identify the host

fields.name: variables
fields.description: Host variables in JSON or YAML format.

fields.name: is_container_group
fields.description: Indicates whether instances in this group are containerized.Containerized groups have a designated Openshift or Kubernetes cluster.

fields.name: max_concurrent_jobs
fields.description: Maximum number of concurrent jobs to run on a group. When set to zero, no maximum is enforced.

fields.name: max_forks
fields.description: Maximum number of forks to execute concurrently on a group. When set to zero, no maximum is enforced.

fields.name: policy_instance_list
fields.description: List of exact-match Instances that will be assigned to this group

fields.name: policy_instance_minimum
fields.description: Static minimum number of Instances that will be automatically assign to this group when new instances come online.

fields.name: policy_instance_percentage
fields.description: Minimum percentage of all instances that will be automatically assigned to this group when new instances come online.

name: instances
exclusionReason: AWX instances represent runtime cluster topology and are not managed by this provider.

fields.name: node_state
fields.description:
Indicates the current life cycle stage of this instance.

* `provisioning` - Provisioning
* `provision-fail` - Provisioning Failure
* `installed` - Installed
* `ready` - Ready
* `unavailable` - Unavailable
* `deprovisioning` - De-provisioning
* `deprovision-fail` - De-provisioning Failure

fields.name: node_type
fields.description:
Role that this node plays in the mesh.

* `control` - Control plane node
* `execution` - Execution plane node
* `hybrid` - Controller and execution
* `hop` - Message-passing node, no execution capability

fields.name: peers
fields.description: Primary keys of receptor addresses to peer to.

fields.name: host_filter
fields.description: Filter that will be applied to the hosts of this inventory.

fields.name: kind
fields.description:
Kind of inventory being represented.

* `` - Hosts have a direct link to this inventory.
* `smart` - Hosts for inventory generated using the host_filter property.
* `constructed` - Parse list of source inventories with the constructed inventory plugin.

fields.name: opa_query_path
fields.description: The query path for the OPA policy to evaluate prior to job execution. The query path should be formatted as package/rule.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: Organization containing this inventory.

fields.name: prevent_instance_group_fallback
fields.description: If enabled, the inventory will prevent adding any organization instance groups to the list of preferred instances groups to run associated job templates on.If this setting is enabled and you provided an empty list, the global instance groups will be applied.

fields.name: variables
fields.description: Inventory variables in JSON or YAML format.

fields.name: credential
fields.description: Cloud credential to use for inventory updates.

fields.name: enabled_value
fields.description: Only used when enabled_var is set. Value when the host is considered enabled. For example if enabled_var="status.power_state"and enabled_value="powered_on" with host variables:{   "status": {     "power_state": "powered_on",     "created": "2020-08-04T18:13:04+00:00",     "healthy": true    },    "name": "foobar",    "ip_address": "192.168.2.1"}The host would be marked enabled. If power_state where any value other than powered_on then the host would be disabled when imported. If the key is not found then the host will be enabled

fields.name: enabled_var
fields.description: Retrieve the enabled state from the given dict of host variables. The enabled variable may be specified as "foo.bar", in which case the lookup will traverse into nested dicts, equivalent to: from_dict.get("foo", {}).get("bar", default)

fields.name: execution_environment
fields.description: The container image to be used for execution.

fields.name: host_filter
fields.description: This field is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. Regex where only matching hosts will be imported.

fields.name: limit
fields.description: Enter host, group or pattern match

fields.name: overwrite
fields.description: Overwrite local groups and hosts from remote inventory source.

fields.name: overwrite_vars
fields.description: Overwrite local variables from remote inventory source.

fields.name: scm_branch
fields.description: Inventory source SCM branch. Project default used if blank. Only allowed if project allow_override field is set to true.

If power_state where any value other than powered_on then the host would be disabled when imported. If the key is not found then the host will be enabled

fields.description: If enabled then the node will only run if all of the parent nodes have met the criteria to reach this node

fields.name: do_not_run
fields.description: Indicates that a job will not be created when True. Workflow runtime semantics will mark this True if the node is in a path that will decidedly not be ran. A value of False means the node may not run.
